services.source_quote: Specialized academic instruction (reading): 150 minutes per week; 30 minutes, 5 times weekly; provider: Special education teacher.

goals.text: Given a grade-level passage, Aanya will decode multisyllabic words with 85% accuracy on 4 of 5 probes.
goals.source_quote: Given a grade-level passage, Aanya will decode multisyllabic words with 85% accuracy on 4 of 5 probes.

goals.text: Marcus will independently begin a classroom task within two minutes of the direction in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.baseline: Begins a task within two minutes in 1 of 5 opportunities.

goals.text: Ethan will complete and submit in-class assignments in 4 of 5 opportunities without redirection.

goals.text: Jamal will organize a multi-paragraph response using an outline in 4 of 5 samples.
